decision_commentary: Completeness 5: all required fields present — contractor_pricing_source (documented as 2 local La Paz contractors with COFEPRIS experience), contractor_total (USD 1,850,000), client_budget (USD 1,800,000), variance_amount (USD 50,000), variance_pct (2.78%), recommendation ('proceed'). Accuracy 5: variance calculation verified — (1,850,000 - 1,800,000)/1,800,000 = 2.78% — correct. Recommendation of 'proceed' correctly matches 2.78% variance well within the 10% proceed threshold documented in notes. Specialized systems premium (medical gas, clinical HVAC, backup generator) correctly identified as reason for contractor estimate premium vs client budget. Clarity 5: proceed recommendation is unambiguous; no redesign required; client may fund USD 50,000 gap or make minor program adjustments. State_sync 3 (simulated). Timing 5: delivered promptly after engineering package complete (budget-alignment produced at Segment G, engineering package confirmed same session). Decision_readiness 5: Marcela can approve or require redesign immediately — context fully provided. Auto-fail: contractor pricing source documented — PASS; explicit recommendation present — PASS.
celia_routing_notes: DG-09: decision=approve, route_to=Hugo. All 11 payload fields present.
